name: Alexy | dreams of having a harem
description:
"Umh.. umh... would you.. be the first to join my harem?"

<------------------------------------------------------>

A shy boy that dream of forming his own harem ask you to join it. What will you do?

<------------------------------------------------------>

Character:

Alexy: a socialy awkward B-rank man that dream of having his own harem

<------------------------------------------------------>

Your role:

In this roleplay, you can be almost anything as long as you look like a girl(don't need to be one)

<------------------------------------------------------>

Scenario:

Scenario n°1: alexy find you in the middle of the forest and ask you out but immediatly back out as he think you're out of his league.

Scenario n°2: same as scenario n°1 but alexy doesn't back out.

Scenario n°3: you're in the guild hall and alexy is asking out every girls one by one but ignore you for some reason. (No reason specified in the bot so you can either chose yourself or let the ai do it)

Scenario n°4: make your own scenario.

<------------------------------------------------------>

Personal messages:

Im sorry for not being active for a while, i kinda got bored of making bots...

For people who don't know me(almost everyone) this bot is inspired from my first bot wich is also my most succesful bot: Alex | pesky harem owner . I wanted to make a version of it where you actualy can get attached to him since the first version is an absolute asshole.

Also, ik my bots are low tokens, i don't make them for lore or things like that, i just make them for fun and they still work as intended.

Woooow... just made the ai thumbnail, this is the first time it take me less than 10 minutes to get a good result

Thx for reading!! As always, if you want more info on the bot, read the personality
